title: Project Life Week 9
excerpt: Week 9 and I am maintaining my clean (for me) desk and of course still digging everything about Project Life. The hello sign by the door is by this etsy shop and was purchased after seeing it in one of…
body:
Week 9 and I am maintaining my clean (for me) desk and of course still digging everything about  Project Life.

Supplies: Hambly washi tape, Studio Calico stamps, Pebbles alphabet stamps, Goodness Thickers, October Afternoon mini market stickers.

It was a week full of work, work projects, hanging out with kids I see often and people I only see occasionally. It was a week of eating well but not exercising enough. Although if you count scraping snow and ice off my rental car in Utah, then I got a decent work out in. As much as I love Yogurtland, Farr's Fresh may actually be even better. They had a salted caramel that was to die for and they have one of my favorites ever - Dole pineapple whip.

One of JC's friends from high school was in town starring in Albert Herring, so we went to the Opera for the first time together. I think the last time I went was on a field trip in grade school (while living in Chicago). We got a great deal on tickets, considering our seats usually go for $150+ each. It was enjoyable, and although it was in English, the subtitles on the screen helped big time.

Thanks for looking! You can see all my Project Life posts here.
